scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && cargo fmt --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --all
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && cargo fmt --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --all -- --check
